PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KOBZANETS, SVETLANA KOBZANETS, YELENA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAO, PAUL PAO, AGATHA $7,550.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,550.00, PLTF SVETLANA KOBZANETS SHALL RECOVER DAMAGES IN THE SUM OF $2,800.00; PLTF YELENA KOBZANETS SHALL RECOVER DAMAGES IN THE SUM OF $4,750.00; PLTFS AWARDED STATUTORY COSTS OF SUIT; SEE AWARD AT LENGTH.
